Obscure Aesthetics Part 2: Older Brother Core.                         This aesthetic centered on the relaxed, functional, and slightly worn-in style of a dependable 90s or early 2000s male figure, often featuring oversized flannels, vintage graphic tees, and baggy denim. It gained massive popularity in the early 2020s via social media as a "comfort" style that prioritizes a sense of nostalgic security and effortless cool over high-fashion trends.
